title: East Anglia THREE Offshore Wind Farm: post-consent condition discharge, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by East Anglia THREE Limited to approve the Cromer Primary Surveillance Radar mitigation scheme as part of the East Anglia THREE Offshore Wind Farm.  Date of decision  8 January 2026  Company  East Anglia THREE Limited  Location   Offshore east of Lowestoft   Type of project  Post-consent condition discharge of The East Anglia THREE Offshore Wind Farm Order 2017 (as amended), as made under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  N/A "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
